nasb.text: At that time I also said to the people, “Let each man with his servant spend the night within Jerusalem so that they may be a guard for us by night and a laborer by day.”

esv.text: I also said to the people at that time, “Let every man and his servant pass the night within Jerusalem, that they may be a guard for us by night and may labor by day.”

cnv.text: 那時，我又對眾人說：“各人和他的僕人都要在耶路撒冷城中過夜，這樣他們可以在夜間作我們的守衛，日間工作。”

ccb.text: 那时，我又吩咐众人各带仆人在耶路撒冷住宿。他们夜间可以帮我们守卫，白天帮我们工作。
